hero.name: Marco Andres Schneider
hero.role: Intern @ Mercedes-Benz · Data · AI · Web · UX
hero.tagline: Intern in Data Management at Mercedes-Benz and Business Informatics student at HdM Stuttgart — hands-on experience in web development, UX, and IT support, with a fascination for AI, LLMs, and Business Intelligence.
hero.bodyP1: Hi, I'm Marco — a Business Informatics student at Stuttgart Media University (HdM).
hero.bodyP2: What I love most is exploring new systems, seeing what tools can really do and building something that's actually useful. Learning is just part of who I am — I enjoy working at the intersection of different disciplines and tend to pick up new topics on my own.
hero.bodyP3: For several years I've been volunteering in youth and children's ministry. Part of that is the <dcg>DCG Germany</dcg> media team, where I contribute as a hobby.
hero.bodyP5: Off the screen I've traded gaming for running. What keeps me grounded: fresh air, the wind on a scooter ride and good people around me.

skills.title: Skills & Tools
skills.kicker: What I bring to the table

now.title: Now
now.bodyP1: I'm studying Business Informatics (B.Sc.) at Stuttgart Media University and currently doing a six-month Data Management internship at Mercedes-Benz. My main goal: soak up as much as possible in a genuinely interesting environment and build hands-on experience with data structures and processes. What I find particularly interesting is getting a look inside a large corporation after previously working in a startup setting.
now.bodyP2: What fascinates me most right now is how capable AI keeps getting — and how much potential there is in growing into an "AI enabler" role: building the bridge between technology, processes and people.
now.bodyP3: On the side I'm running half marathons, with a long-term goal of a sub-3-hour marathon. And I'm slowly working through guitar for myself.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Open for internships, freelance work, or just a good chat about tech and design.
contact.cvHint: For a complete overview of my experience and qualifications, you can download my CV.
